vocabulary.meaning: 抱持對未來的期望，欲實現的人生目標
vocabulary.example: She has high ambitions for her future.
vocabulary.example_translation: 她對未來充滿了期望

vocabulary.example: The authentic painting was worth millions.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那真正的繪畫值得數百萬元

vocabulary.meaning: 觸發因素，促進某一過程的催化劑
vocabulary.example: The discovery of the catalyst led to a breakthrough.
vocabulary.example_translation: 對於那個觸發因素的發現，讓科學家取得了突破

vocabulary.meaning: 困難的抉擇，兩難的處境
vocabulary.example: She faced a dilemma in choosing between two jobs.
vocabulary.example_translation: 她在面臨選擇兩個工作的困境

vocabulary.meaning: 說話有力，表現得非常自然
vocabulary.example: The eloquent speaker won the hearts of the audience.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那位說話有力的演講者贏得了現場觀眾的芳心

vocabulary.example: Don't fabricate stories to deceive people.
vocabulary.example_translation: 不要製造故事來騙取他人

vocabulary.example: Hazardous waste can pollute the environment.
vocabulary.example_translation: 有害廢物可以汙染環境

vocabulary.example: The inevitable outcome of the election was clear.
vocabulary.example_translation: 選舉的結果已經不可避免

vocabulary.example: The company is at risk of falling into jeopardy.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那家公司面臨著倒閉的風險

vocabulary.example: The kooky behavior of the artist was inspiring.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那個藝術家的奇怪行為讓人深受啟發

vocabulary.meaning: 可嘉可讚的，值得表揚的
vocabulary.example: The laudable effort of the charity is admirable.
vocabulary.example_translation: 這項功德無窮的慈善事業令人欽佩

vocabulary.example: The meticulous work of the craftsman was impressive.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那個手工藝人的細致工作令人印象深刻

vocabulary.example: Water is necesary for human survival.
vocabulary.example_translation: 水對於人類的生存至關重要

vocabulary.example: The obstinate employee refused to follow the rules.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那個不願意配合的員工堅持抗拒公司規則

vocabulary.meaning: 矛盾的東西，反差極大的兩個特性
vocabulary.example: The paradox of the situation was hard to understand.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那種令人困惑的情況充滿了矛盾

vocabulary.example: The patient was sent to the quarantine.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那個病人被送到隔離區

vocabulary.example: The reckless driver was fined.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那位冒險駕駛被罰款

vocabulary.example: The patient was given sedation to calm down.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那位病人被注射鎮定劑

vocabulary.example: The tremendous progress of the team was amazing.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那支隊伍的可觀進步令人難以置信

vocabulary.meaning: 不可預測的，很不穩定的
vocabulary.example: The weather is unpredictable, be prepared.
vocabulary.example_translation: 不預計好的天氣，要準備好

vocabulary.example: The vulnerable creature needs protection.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那個弱小的生物需要保護

vocabulary.example: The wonderful scenery was breathtaking.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那個令人驚嘆的風景令人著迷

vocabulary.example: Xenophobia is a serious issue in some countries.
vocabulary.example_translation: 排外主義在一些國家是一個嚴重的問題

vocabulary.example: She had a yearning for freedom.
vocabulary.example_translation: 她渴望自由

vocabulary.example: The zealous fan was supportive of his team.
vocabulary.example_translation: 那位非常熱心的球迷對他的球隊很有支持

vocabulary.meaning: 豐富的供給，充足的資源
vocabulary.example: The abundance of water in the region made it suitable for agriculture.
vocabulary.example_translation: 當地豐富的水源使得該區適合農業開發
